Aaron Nesmith

Pronunciation: \Aaron nee-smith\

Aaron Joshua Nesmith ▪ Instagram: aaron_nesmith

Position: Small Forward ▪ Shoots: Right

6-5, 215lb (196cm, 97kg)

Team: Indiana Pacers

Born: October 16, 1999 (Age: 26-270d) in Charleston, South Carolina us

College: Vanderbilt

High School: Porter-Gaud School in Charleston, South Carolina

Recruiting Rank: 2018 (63)

Draft: Boston Celtics, 1st round (14th pick, 14th overall), 2020 NBA Draft

NBA Debut: December 25, 2020

Experience: 6 years

Transactions

January 12, 2015: As part of a 3-team trade, traded by the Memphis Grizzlies (as a future 2020 1st round draft pick) with Tayshaun Prince to the Boston Celtics; the Boston Celtics traded Jeff Green to the Memphis Grizzlies; the Memphis Grizzlies traded Quincy Pondexter and a 2015 2nd round draft pick (Branden Dawson was later selected) to the New Orleans Pelicans; the New Orleans Pelicans traded Austin Rivers to the Boston Celtics; and the New Orleans Pelicans traded Russ Smith to the Memphis Grizzlies. (Memphis will receive a traded player exception.)

November 18, 2020: Drafted by the Boston Celtics in the 1st round (14th pick) of the 2020 NBA Draft.

November 24, 2020: Signed a multi-year contract with the Boston Celtics.

January 9, 2022: Assigned to the Maine Celtics of the G-League.

January 10, 2022: Recalled from the Maine Celtics of the G-League.

March 22, 2022: Assigned to the Maine Celtics of the G-League.

March 23, 2022: Recalled from the Maine Celtics of the G-League.

July 9, 2022: Traded by the Boston Celtics with Malik Fitts, Juwan Morgan, Nik Stauskas, Daniel Theis and a 2023 1st round draft pick (Julian Strawther was later selected) to the Indiana Pacers for Malcolm Brogdon. conditional 2023 1st-rd pick was BOS own, Indiana also receives a trade exception

October 23, 2023: Signed a contract extension with the Indiana Pacers.

October 20, 2025: Signed a contract extension with the Indiana Pacers.

Current Contract

  • Player Option, Team Option  ·   NBA Contracts Summary

Team 2026-27 2027-28 2028-29
Table
Indiana Pacers $11,000,000 $19,418,000 $20,971,440
  • Signed extension Monday, October 23, 2023.
  • Team option exercised Wednesday, October 12, 2022.
  • Traded from BOS to IND Saturday, July 9, 2022.
  • 2022-23 option exercised Monday, November 1, 2021.
  • 2022-23 and 2023-24 are team options.
  • Signed rookie scale contract on Tuesday, November 24, 2020.

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Aaron Nesmith?

Aaron Nesmith is 26 years old.

Where was Aaron Nesmith born?

Aaron Nesmith was born in Charleston, South Carolina.

When was Aaron Nesmith born?

Aaron Nesmith was born on October 16, 1999.

How tall is Aaron Nesmith?

Aaron Nesmith is 6-5 (196 cm) tall.

How much does Aaron Nesmith weigh?

Aaron Nesmith weighs 215 lbs (97 kg).

Is Aaron Nesmith in the Hall of Fame?

Aaron Nesmith is not in the Hall of Fame.

When was Aaron Nesmith drafted?

Aaron Nesmith was drafted by Boston Celtics, 1st round (14th pick, 14th overall), 2020 NBA Draft.

What position does Aaron Nesmith play?

Small Forward.

What is Aaron Nesmith's net worth?

Aaron Nesmith has made at least $38,528,217 playing professional basketball.

How much does Aaron Nesmith make?

Aaron Nesmith made $11,000,000 in 2025.

How many rings does Aaron Nesmith have?

Aaron Nesmith has won 0 championships.

What is Aaron Nesmith's Instagram account?

Aaron Nesmith is on Instagram at aaron_nesmith.

What schools did Aaron Nesmith attend?

Aaron Nesmith attended Porter-Gaud School in Charleston, South Carolina and Vanderbilt.
